WESTERN SOUTH ATLANTIC.
BRAZIL-SOUTHEAST COAST.
DNC 01.
1. SURVEY OPERATIONS 25 AUG THRU 01 SEP BY
   M/V GEOWAVE VOYAGER TOWING SIX 250
   METER LONG CABLES IN AREA BETWEEN
   21-06S 21-22S AND 040-13W 039-40W.
   WIDE BERTH REQUESTED.
2. CANCEL HYDROLANT 2615/18.
3. CANCEL THIS MSG 02 SEP 18.
